mapper.select:
select d.*,c.name as departmentName from doctor d left join department c on d.department_id = c.id
and d.name like concat('%',#{name},'%')
and d.departmentId like concat('%',#{departmentId},'%')
and d.status like concat('%',#{status},'%')
order by d.create_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into doctor (name, department_id, price, image, description, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, status) values (#{name}, #{departmentId}, #{price}, #{image}, #{description}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{status})
